parameters.query: SELECT rn.*, vs.brand_voice, vs.social_media_style FROM raw_news rn LEFT JOIN vertical_settings vs ON rn.category = vs.vertical_name WHERE rn.status = 'pending' AND rn.importance_score >= 6 ORDER BY rn.published_at DESC LIMIT 10;

options.systemMessage: Sen profesyonel bir dijital medya içerik üreticisisin. Türkçe yaz. Her platform için özel içerik üret. Sadece JSON çıktısı ver.

parameters.query: =INSERT INTO generated_content (news_id, title, slug, article, meta_description, twitter_post, instagram_carousel, linkedin_post, seo_keywords, category, word_count, reading_time, status, version) VALUES ({{ $json.news_id }}, '{{ ($json.title || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}', '{{ ($json.slug || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}', '{{ ($json.article || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}', '{{ ($json.meta_description || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}', '{{ ($json.twitter_post || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}', '{{ $json.instagram_carousel }}', '{{ ($json.linkedin_post || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}', '{{ $json.seo_keywords }}', '{{ $json.category }}', {{ $json.word_count || 0 }}, {{ $json.reading_time || 1 }}, '{{ $json.status }}', {{ $json.version }}) RETURNING id;

=INSERT INTO system_logs (workflow_name, log_level, message, details) VALUES ('02_icerik_fabrikasi', 'info', 'İçerik üretildi: {{ $json.title }}', '{{ JSON.stringify({news_id: $json.news_id, word_count: $json.word_count, category: $json.category}).replace(/'/g, "''") }}');
